title: Person Vaccine and SIRV Status Schema
description: Schema describing static and dynamic attributes for an individual in a vaccination and infection simulation model.

static.description: Static demographic, geographic, and behavioral characteristics.

comorbidity.description: Indicates whether the individual has one or more comorbidities.

vaccineAcceptance.description: Indicates whether the individual is willing to accept vaccination.

dynamic.description: Dynamic health, vaccination, infection, recovery, and location variables that may change over time.

vaccineStatus.description: Indicates whether the individual is currently vaccinated.

proactiveVaccine.description: Indicates whether the individual proactively received a vaccination.

numberOfInfections.description: Total number of infections experienced by the individual.

sirvStatus.description: Current SIRV status of the individual: susceptible, infected, recovered, or vaccinated.

infectedDays.description: Number of days the individual has been infected.

vaccinatedDays.description: Number of days since the individual was vaccinated.

recoveredDays.description: Number of days since the individual recovered from infection.

currentLocation.description: Current x and y coordinate location of the individual.

xcor.description: Current x-coordinate location of the individual.

ycor.description: Current y-coordinate location of the individual.
